Regarding the core feature 'Medium Speed' (语速: 中速), the delivery is actually quite fast. Specifically, the segment '我马上回来帮您处理' (00:01-00:02) is spoken very rapidly, rushing through the syllables. model_comparison: Both models achieve perfect content accuracy and high naturalness. The differentiating factor is the adherence to the specific 'Medium Speed' (中速) instruction.
